workloads.name: Node ORT WebGPU provider compare Gemma-3 270M prefill 32 decode 1
workloads.description: Repo-only same-stack Node ORT WebGPU compare for a short interactive Gemma-3 270M shape using the same Transformers.js plus onnxruntime-node workload on both sides.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Strict process-wall provider compare. Same model, same ORT WebGPU stack, same tokenizer-accurate prompt synthesis, and same host. The only intended difference is Doe versus node-webgpu as the WebGPU provider.
